title: Ecobank Nigeria and Soto Gallery Announce 2026 +234 Art Fair, Championing “Inclusivity - FinancialEDGE
description: Ecobank Nigeria, in partnership with Soto Gallery, has announced plans to host the third edition of the +234 Art Fair, scheduled to take place from 5–8 March 2026 at the Ecobank Pan‑African Centre, Victoria Island, Lagos. The 2026 edition, themed “Inclusivity,” underscores Ecobank and Soto Gallery’s shared commitment to creative entrepreneurship, equitable access, and the deliberate expansion of opportunity within
html: Ecobank Nigeria, in partnership with Soto Gallery, has announced plans to host the third edition of the +234 Art Fair, scheduled to take place from 5–8 March 2026 at the Ecobank Pan‑African Centre, Victoria Island, Lagos.
